LanguageData.ConnectedTreeDied.stages.0.description: My tree... its calming presence became pure pain, then went silent. Its suffering echoes in my mind...
LanguageData.ConnectedTreeDied.stages.0.label: Treefather death
LanguageData.DryadDied.stages.0.description: My Treefather's treeminder is gone forever. You shall be missed, little one.
LanguageData.DryadDied.stages.0.label: treeminder died
LanguageData.GauranlenConnectionDesired.stages.0.desc: I am happily connected to a Treefather.
LanguageData.GauranlenConnectionDesired.stages.1.desc: Without a connection to a Treefather, I feel disconnected from nature.
LanguageData.GauranlenConnectionDesired.stages.2.desc: Without a connection to a Treefather, I feel disconnected from nature.
LanguageData.GauranlenConnectionDesired.stages.3.desc: Without a connection to a Treefather, I feel disconnected from nature.
LanguageData.GauranlenConnectionDesired.stages.4.desc: Without a connection to a Treefather, I feel disconnected from nature.
LanguageData.GauranlenConnectionDesired.stages.5.desc: Without a connection to a Treefather, I feel disconnected from nature.
LanguageData.Greenway_MutantCitizenship_ColonistPrese: Mutants live beside us as fellow citizens. The colony is stronger for it.
LanguageData.Greenway_MutantMasters_MutantColonistPre: The colony is guided by mutant strength, as it should be.
LanguageData.Greenway_MutantMasters_NonMutantSlavePre: Unmutated labor serves beneath mutant authority.
LanguageData.Greenway_MutantPurge_MutantColonistPrese: Mutants are living freely inside the colony. This cannot stand.
Even chained mutants remain an offense against the colony's purity.
LanguageData.Greenway_MutantSlaves_MutantColonistPres: A mutant stands as a free colonist when it should be a slave.
LanguageData.Greenway_MutantSlaves_SlaveStatus.stages: The colony has mutant slaves to exploit and control.
There should be mutant labor in chains here, not wasted freedom.
LanguageData.Greenway_SecondClassMutants_MutantSlaveP: The mutant stock is being used properly, beneath the colony's true citizens.
Mutants are here, building the future that belongs to them.
LanguageData.Greenway_Utobitha_NonMutantPresent.stage: Non-mutants are still present in a homeland that should belong to mutant kind alone.
